subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath strengthened His chosen servants and His pure handmaidens to recognize the Dawning-Place of His Self and the Orient [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اید عباده الاصفیاء و امائه الزاکیات علی عرفان مطلع نفسه و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
